details.test: Task 1: Filter indoor smoke detectors and add 4 units to cart
Task 2: Request quote for office package (>=8 devices, <=$1500)
Task 3: Select 24/7 monitoring maintenance plan (<$100) and enroll
Task 4: Book annual fire system inspection for 25,000 sq ft warehouse
Task 5: Use smoke vs heat article to pick heat detector and add 2 units to cart
Task 6: Find control panel (800-1200, >=4 zones) and download installation manual
Task 7: Use system designer for 3-story apartment building and save configuration
Task 8: Submit high-priority support request for WX-200 false alarms
Task 9: Build safety kit (extinguisher, exit sign, fire blanket) and choose standard shipping
Task 10: Find restaurant fire safety guide and submit consultation request
